chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Drinking Alcohol and Reports Regarding Singing and Amusements

text: 5096 - : وَ نَهَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ عَنْ تَحْرِيشِ اَلْبَهَائِمِ مَا خَلاَ اَلْكِلاَبَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5096 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) forbade inciting animals against one another, except in the case of dogs.
